# Templates — NaviOpsEnterprise

Reusable skeletons for the artifacts every lesson produces (the 6-artifact contract,
`CLAUDE_TEACHING_RULES.md` §9). Copy a template, fill it in, sanitize it (placeholders only —
`navi.project.md` Hard Rule #1), and commit it to the matching folder.

| Template | Use it for | Lands in |
|---|---|---|
| `ticket-note.md` | the worked ticket / resolution note | `docs/tickets/` |
| `kb-article.md` | end-user-facing self-service article | `docs/kb/` |
| `runbook.md` | "when this ticket comes in, do X" | `docs/runbooks/` |
| `troubleshooting-guide.md` | symptom → cause → fix decision guide | `docs/troubleshooting/` |
| `incident-report.md` | post-incident writeup | `docs/runbooks/` or lesson folder |
| `rca.md` | root-cause analysis (major/recurring) | lesson folder / `docs/runbooks/` |
